message:
test(frankenterm-gui): add 7 GPU stress / DPI / resize golden fixtures (ft-ombfl.14)

Lands the stress and resize-sequence golden corpus that bead
ft-ombfl.14 schedules. Pairs with the gpu_regression test-driver
expansion in e25384f66 (which added the GeneratedLinesSpec /
ResizeFrameSpec / fixture_filters wiring) and the headless_render
out-of-bounds guard in the same commit.

Each fixture is a triple (input.json, expected.json, meta.json) under
tests/golden/gpu/stress/<name>/. The harness loads the input, renders
through the production headless rasterizer, and diffs against the
expected.json byte goldens with the fixture metadata pinned in
meta.json (viewport size, DPI, texture format, font_set_sha,
harness_version).

The seven new fixtures cover four stress dimensions:

1. many-panes-30 — a 30-tile pane-tree fixture (5 columns × 6 rows of
   ASCII pane cells with agent labels) at 960×210 / DPI 96. Pins the
   render path's behavior under high pane density and ensures the
   harness handles the GeneratedLinesSpec template substitution
   added in e25384f66.

2. extreme-content-100k — single fixture with ~100k characters of
   generated text. Verifies the new bounds guard in
   rasterize_fixture_input (the visual_row * cell_h >= height break)
   keeps the harness running once the declared content overflows the
   framebuffer instead of panicking.

3-6. dpi-1_00 / dpi-1_25 / dpi-1_50 / dpi-2_00 — same content
     rendered at four DPI scaling factors. Pins the per-DPI cell
     metrics + glyph atlas selection so a future shaper or font-stack
     change can't silently shift the pixel-perfect output at a
     specific DPI.

7. rapid-resize-10s — exercises the new ResizeFrameSpec
   resize_sequence slot with multiple per-second viewport changes
   over a 10-second window. Pins behavior under mid-render resizes —
   the contract that a resize never tears the framebuffer or strands
   stale glyphs.

Each fixture's meta.json records `font_set_sha:
"headless-rasterizer-stress-v1"` and `harness_version: 1`, so a
shaper / harness update that breaks compatibility surfaces as a
fixture-wide diff rather than seven independent failures.

Total addition: 21 JSON files. No production code changes — the
runtime support landed in e25384f66; this commit only populates the
goldens that drive the harness against those new code paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+{
+  "kind": "headless_terminal",
+  "lines": [
+    "dpi matrix fixture: scale 1.00",
+    "glyph cache, cursor, and selection should render identically at this density",
+    "+--- dpi pane A ---+ +--- dpi pane B ---+ +--- dpi pane C ---+",
+    "| 1.00 baseline    | | text wraps here   | | edge seam check  |",
+    "+------------------+ +------------------+ +------------------+"
+  ],
+  "cursor": {
+    "row": 3,
+    "col": 8,
+    "shape": "underline"
+  },
+  "selection": {
+    "start_row": 2,
+    "start_col": 23,
+    "end_row": 4,
+    "end_col": 42
+  },
+  "cursor_blink_disabled": true,
+  "ime_disabled": true
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+{
+  "kind": "headless_terminal",
+  "lines": [
+    "extreme content stress: generated 100000 scrollback lines, target output >10MB",
+    "visible header should stay stable while generated offscreen scrollback is accepted",
+    "+--- visible pane 0 ---+ +--- visible pane 1 ---+ +--- visible pane 2 ---+",
+    "| active prompt        | | long scrollback      | | gpu upload stable   |",
+    "+----------------------+ +----------------------+ +---------------------+"
+  ],
+  "generated_lines": {
+    "count": 100000,
+    "template": "{i} scrollback payload abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ 0123456789 repeated-content-for-10mb-target"
+  },
+  "cursor": {
+    "row": 3,
+    "col": 4,
+    "shape": "block"
+  },
+  "selection": {
+    "start_row": 1,
+    "start_col": 0,
+    "end_row": 4,
+    "end_col": 78
+  },
+  "cursor_blink_disabled": true,
+  "ime_disabled": true
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+{
+  "kind": "headless_terminal",
+  "lines": [
+    "+--00 cod_4--+ +--01 cc_1---+ +--02 cod_1--+ +--03 cc_2---+ +--04 cod_2--+",
+    "| build pass | | review    | | compile   | | gpu diff  | | watcher   |",
+    "+--05 cod_3--+ +--06 cod_4--+ +--07 cc_1---+ +--08 cod_1--+ +--09 cc_2---+",
+    "| resize seq | | pane grid | | blocked   | | running   | | merged    |",
+    "+--10 cod_2--+ +--11 cod_3--+ +--12 cod_4--+ +--13 cc_1---+ +--14 cod_1--+",
+    "| scrollback | | dpi 1.25  | | dpi 1.50  | | dpi 2.00  | | stress    |",
+    "+--15 cc_2---+ +--16 cod_2--+ +--17 cod_3--+ +--18 cod_4--+ +--19 cc_1---+",
+    "| seams      | | borders   | | cursor    | | selection | | glyphs    |",
+    "+--20 cod_1--+ +--21 cc_2---+ +--22 cod_2--+ +--23 cod_3--+ +--24 cod_4--+",
+    "| history   | | search    | | replay    | | storage   | | render    |",
+    "+--25 cc_1---+ +--26 cod_1--+ +--27 cc_2---+ +--28 cod_2--+ +--29 cod_3--+",
+    "| final row | | edge left | | edge mid  | | edge mid  | | edge right|"
+  ],
+  "cursor": {
+    "row": 1,
+    "col": 3,
+    "shape": "block"
+  },
+  "selection": {
+    "start_row": 8,
+    "start_col": 34,
+    "end_row": 10,
+    "end_col": 61
+  },
+  "cursor_blink_disabled": true,
+  "ime_disabled": true
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+{
+  "kind": "headless_terminal",
+  "lines": [
+    "rapid resize stress: 1Hz sequence over 10s, final frame must be stable",
+    "00: 640x360 -> 01: 720x390 -> 02: 800x420 -> 03: 960x480",
+    "04: 700x500 -> 05: 1100x560 -> 06: 880x440 -> 07: 1024x600",
+    "08: 760x540 -> 09: 920x504 final",
+    "+----- left pane after reflow -----+ +----- right pane after reflow -----+",
+    "| wrapping text keeps row order    | | dpi-independent cell raster stays |",
+    "| border seams are redrawn cleanly | | cursor lands in final coordinate  |",
+    "+----------------------------------+ +-----------------------------------+"
+  ],
+  "resize_sequence": [
+    { "second": 0, "width": 640, "height": 360, "dpi": 96.0 },
+    { "second": 1, "width": 720, "height": 390, "dpi": 96.0 },
+    { "second": 2, "width": 800, "height": 420, "dpi": 96.0 },
+    { "second": 3, "width": 960, "height": 480, "dpi": 96.0 },
+    { "second": 4, "width": 700, "height": 500, "dpi": 96.0 },
+    { "second": 5, "width": 1100, "height": 560, "dpi": 96.0 },
+    { "second": 6, "width": 880, "height": 440, "dpi": 96.0 },
+    { "second": 7, "width": 1024, "height": 600, "dpi": 96.0 },
+    { "second": 8, "width": 760, "height": 540, "dpi": 96.0 },
+    { "second": 9, "width": 920, "height": 504, "dpi": 96.0 }
+  ],
+  "cursor": {
+    "row": 6,
+    "col": 44,
+    "shape": "beam"
+  },
+  "selection": {
+    "start_row": 5,
+    "start_col": 39,
+    "end_row": 7,
+    "end_col": 73
+  },
+  "cursor_blink_disabled": true,
+  "ime_disabled": true
+}
